violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No food safety manager was present during time of inspection. A food safety manager must be present at all times when food is being prepared, handled, or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The lid on the chicken prep unit was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. The lid on the salad/sandwich prep unit was in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the area behind the cooking line and behind prep units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The vent, ceiling and light fixture above the pizza cutting station have an accumulation of debris. Establishment is to clean area above pizza cutting station. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in cooler blower vent have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
The floor grout by the three bay sink area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2025
